headline: Hasbro Introduces Blooms by Play-Doh, A New Creative Experience Designed for Adults
summary: PAWTUCKET, R.I., July 09, 2026--Blooms by Play-Doh invites adults to slow down, create and display realistic floral arrangements using Play-Doh compound.
